title: KITES Intern
description: Knowledge, Initiative & Talent Excellence Series (KITES) is our flagship Summer Internship Programme designed to provide leaders of tomorrow with a unique platform to learn from, experience and manage real business situations[cite: 500]. [cite_start]Interns will have the opportunity to experience the rigor of live business scenarios, apply their theoretical learnings and gain precious insights into management[cite: 501]. [cite_start]Based on performance, interns are awarded Pre-Placement Offers (PPOs)[cite: 503].

title: Management Trainee - Business
description: Join our one-year rotational program designed to groom future leaders for the Commerce Platform Group[cite: 539]. [cite_start]You will gain broad exposure across critical business functions like Category Management, Marketing, and Business Development[cite: 540]. [cite_start]You will undertake intensive, quick-churn projects and apply technical and functional depth to provide actionable insights and recommendations[cite: 542, 546]. [cite_start]The CTC for the full-time role post-internship is 28.4 LPA[cite: 562].

title: Intern – Business and Strategy Analyst
description: We are seeking a Business and Strategy Analyst for our summer internship program[cite: 612]. [cite_start]The compensation includes a base stipend of INR 1,75,000/month plus 4 months of virtual engagement at INR 9,000/month[cite: 612]. [cite_start]The selection process will involve an online assessment, resume shortlisting, and 2 rounds of interviews[cite: 622].

title: Summer Analyst - Corporate Banking
description: As a Summer Analyst, you will join an intensive 8-week program serving the financial needs of the world's preeminent corporations[cite: 672]. [cite_start]You will advise corporate clients who want to raise funds in capital markets and who need strategic support in financial transactions[cite: 672]. [cite_start]Initiatives include mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, financial restructurings, underwriting, and distributing equity and debt[cite: 672].

title: Associate Product Manager
description: We are looking for an Associate Product Manager summer intern[cite: 441]. [cite_start]The selection process includes resume submission, group discussion, and 2-3 rounds of technical interviews[cite: 449, 451]. [cite_start]Compensation is a fixed stipend of INR 1,50,000 per month[cite: 443].
